Dhamareswar Lakshman Soma
Academic Transcript
⚠ This is not an official transcript. Courses which are in progress may also be included on this transcript. If you
believe the data on the transcript is not accurate, please contact the Registrar's Office either by email at
registrar@fau.edu or by phone at 561-297-3050.
⚠ Term Totals (FAU Recalculated GPA) as listed on your transcript may include course work for which an "NC"
grade was applied to a General Education (Gen Ed) course in which you may not have achieved the minimum
passing grade. The course is taken out of your gpa calculation for current term and cumulative.
Term Totals (Undergraduate) as listed on your transcript exclude any course work for which an "NC" grade was
applied to a General Education (Gen Ed) course. The original grade received for the course is counted in your gpa
calculation for current term and cumulative.
See the General Education Requirements here (https://www.fau.edu/registrar/university-catalog/pre-catalog/degree-
req/#intellectual)
See the No Credit (NC) Grading Policy here (https://www.fau.edu/registrar/university-catalog/pre-
catalog/academics/#ncgrade)
